heading.description: Cross bullet heading accepted by the current smart_layout generation path.

description.description: Specific explanatory sentence for the cross bullet.
description.example: This point identifies a mistake learners should avoid during application.

items.heading: Common Mistake

validation_rules: Block type must be exactly smart_layout.
Items must use fields accepted by the current smart_layout item mapping.
Each primary item description must be 12-15 words.
